Workspace / Presets
Workspace / Presets panel: share, apply URL presets, and reset preferences.
Home for preset sharing, import/export, and reset workflows.
Analysis
Analysis panel: FFT, smoothing, RMS gain.
Scene
Scene panel: enable, order, and inspect active visualizers plus the runtime-only camera hook without leaving the live render.

Camera controls are deferred to Build 116. Build 115 only exposes the ViewTransform seam through the runtime compositor path.
